zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Janet Carruthers於1410年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋道爾頓時，她的父親Andrew Carruthers26歲，母親Elizabeth Dinwoodie28歲。她於1428年與Sir John Menzies在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在英國蘇格蘭培爾維姆享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Janet Carruthers于1410年出生在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋道爾頓时，她的父亲Andrew Carruthers26岁，母亲Elizabeth Dinwoodie28岁。她于1428年与Sir John Menzies在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在英国苏格兰培爾維姆享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carruthers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place near Ecclefechan in Dumfries, locally pronounced ‘kridders’. The name is early recorded as Carrothres or Caer Ruther, and derives from British caer ‘fort’ + a personal name.

variants.name: Crothers
meanings: Irish (northern, especially Down): variant of Scottish   Carruthers  .

variants.name: Carrithers
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Carruthers  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain; it was once common in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Cruthis
meanings: Altered form of Scottish and northern Irish   Carruthers  . This surname is found mainly in IL and NC.

variants.name: Cruthirds
meanings: Altered form of Scottish and northern Irish   Carruthers  . This surname is found mainly in MS.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Janet Carruthers was born in 1410, in Dalton, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew Carruthers, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Dinwoodie, was 28. She married Sir John Menzies in 1428, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1450, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Janet Carruthers est née en 1410, à Dalton, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Carruthers, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Dinwoodie, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Menzies en 1428, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: Dalton, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Janet Carruthers 1410 in Dalton, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Carruthers 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Dinwoodie 28. Sie hat 1428 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Sir John Menzies geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Weem, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Carruthersが1410年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイダルトンで生まれた時，父Andrew Carruthersは26歳，母Elizabeth Dinwoodieは28歳であった。1428年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでSir John Menziesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームで40歳で死去した。

ko.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 돌턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Janet Carruthers(이)가 1410년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 돌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Carruthers(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Dinwoodie(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1428년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Sir John Menzies(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Janet Carruthers nasceu em 1410, em Dalton, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Carruthers, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Dinwoodie, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Menzies em 1428, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Weem, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.Holmains Castle, Dalton, Dumfries and Ga: далтон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Janet Carruthers родилась в 1410 г. в местности далтон, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Andrew Carruthers было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Dinwoodie, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Menzies в 1428 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

Se casó con Sir John Menzies en 1428, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1450, en Weem, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
